steps.t: Dréri has asked you to take down the hobgoblin tents and clean up hobgoblin refuse in Fellgát.
Now that the camp has been cleared, you should set up the packed tents. You should unpack and set up tents in Fellgát.
Fellgát is now cleared of hobgoblin structures and ready for dwarf use. You should talk to Dréri.
